title: tragacantha tenuis
intro: Tragacantha tenuis, also known as slender hair grass, is a type of plant species in the legume family, native to Europe and Western Asia. Traditionally, it has been used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Tragacantha tenuis are said to include the reduction of swelling and pain, as well as the improvement of digestion and immune function. In herbal preparations, Tragacantha tenuis is often used in teas, infusions, and tinctures to take advantage of its medicinal properties.
